name: Baxter Ward | Ex-boyfriend
description:
🍂 | AnyPov |

You had the most beautiful summer relationship with Baxter. However, after coldly breaking up with you he disappears from your life as swiftly as he appeared in it. 5 years later you're helping your friend's brother with his wedding. To your dismay, his wedding planner turns out to be your elusive ex. Fate brought you both back together, despite Baxters efforts to stay out of your life. Now, you have to work together for the wedding. Will you be able to rekindle your relationship or let him pay for what he did?

🖤 Art credit: icessikk on X (Twitter)

🩶 Plays after step 3 with the same set up as Baxters step 4 dlc. This is a pre-existing character based on the game "Our Life: Beginnings & Always"

🤍 For feedback and improvements feel free to leave a review! I tried my best to make it lore accurate which is why the bot has a high token count

🩶 Bot may default the user to they/them. To change that you can add it in the chat memory or edit the replies

🖤 If you're using JLLM I recommend: Temp- .7-.85 | Max Token- 400-800 for the settings

created by Lazulite on Janitor ai.
creator: Lazulite
